title: Windows Spearphishing Attachment Execution
description: Detects suspicious child processes spawned by Microsoft Office applications, indicating potential macro-based spearphishing payload execution. Office documents should not spawn cmd.exe, powershell.exe, or scripting engines.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Parent Process Name' like '*winword.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*excel.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*powerpnt.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*outlook.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*msaccess.exe')) and (('Process Name' like '*cmd.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*pwsh.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*wscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*cscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*mshta.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*regsvr32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*rundll32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*certutil.exe')))
falsepositives: Legitimate Office add-ins that spawn processes
Office macros for approved business automation
